prompt: A cinematic medium portrait of a beautiful woman standing on a seaside balcony at dusk. She wears a white leather midi dress with a structured bodice, thin spaghetti straps, a silver square ring accent at the chest, side-tied waist, and a high slit. Her expression is calm and graceful, head tilted slightly back, hands resting on her hips. Behind her, a soft expanse of grey-blue ocean meets a pale overcast sky. Natural diffused lighting creates gentle shadows and an editorial high-fashion mood. The shot uses a shallow-depth-of-field portrait lens, keeping her sharply in focus while the distant waves blur softly. Warm white tones of the dress contrast against cool coastal blues and greys. Wind-swept hair. 8k, cinematic, elegant fashion aesthetic.
